questions.explanation:
<p>The statement tells the effect of the strike by the transporters.</p>
In conclusion 1, if the government buys vehicles and starts the transport, the price of commodities will come to normal state. But the strike of the transporters is not going to stop, which is not good. So, conclusion 1 does not follow. In conclusion 2, the government is negotiating with transporters and trying to stop the strike because of which the price of commodities will come to normal and the effects of the continuation of the strike will not be there. So, conclusion 2 follows.

questions.statement:
<p>Select the option that is related to the fifth word in the same way as the second word is related to the first word and the fourth word is related to the third word.</p>

<p>Retina : Eye :: Pons : Brain :: Cochlea : ?</p>

<p>Select the option that is related to the third word in the same way as the second word is related to the first.</p>
Kanshi Ram : Bahujan Samaj Party : Syama Prasad Mookherjee : ?
In acertain code language, &lsquo;LAYOUT&rsquo; is written as &lsquo;WRRVDI&rsquo;. How will &lsquo;CHETAK&rsquo; be written in that language?

The second number in the given number-pairs is obtained by performing certain mathematical operation(s) on the first number. The same operation(s) is/are followed in all the number-pairs except one. Find that odd number-pair.

Mukesh starts walking towards East. He goes 15 m and takes a right turn and goes 30m to reach point A. At point A Mukesh takes a left turn and goes 25m and reached point B. At point B he takes a right turn and goes 30m and reaches point C. In which direction is Mukesh facing now?

<p>There are two couples in a family. Komali has two children. Madhurima is the wife of Omprakash, who is the brother of Mani. Pinki is the daughter of Komali. Urmila is the sister of Sanju, who is the son of Omprakash. Tarun is the son of Mani, who is a male.</p>

<p>How is Madhurima is related to Komali?</p>
If 19<sup>th</sup> May 2012 was a Saturday, what day was 1<sup>st</sup> April 2014?
